task: Set up a project coordination and progress reporting protocol for this repository.
summary: Initialized .agent-dashboard as the primary progress source and created starter protocol, context, status, reports, run, and thread files.

completed_work.title: Repository inspection
completed_work.evidence: Root directory was listed before edits; no existing dashboard files were present.

completed_work.title: Dashboard structure creation
completed_work.evidence: Created all required directories and files under .agent-dashboard plus AGENTS.md.

completed_work.title: Protocol starter content
completed_work.evidence: Added reporting rules, schema examples, status taxonomy, project context, and handoff notes.

remaining_work: Replace starter context with project-specific details.
Create validation or visualization tooling if needed.

verification.name: pre_change_inspection
verification.details: Inspected repository structure before changing files.

verification.name: required_file_creation
verification.details: All files requested by the setup task were created with starter content.

verification.name: json_parse_check
verification.details: All JSON files under .agent-dashboard parsed with PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json.

verification.name: hidden_file_inventory
verification.details: Used rg --files --hidden to confirm the dashboard file inventory.

next_recommended_prompts: Summarize the current .agent-dashboard state and identify the next highest-value project task.
Update the project context files with real product and architecture details.

secret_handling.notes: No secrets were added to dashboard files.
